channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukraine Says U.S. Is Increasing Pressure for a Deal as the Midterms Loom
item.description: It is unclear what the Trump administration is prepared to do if it does not get the concessions it wants from Kyiv on issues like territory and elect...

item.title: The Transformative Power of the White âRace Traitorâ
item.description: From Schwerner and Goodman to Good and Pretti, white people putting themselves in harmâs way has helped galvanize Americans for justice.

item.title: A D.H.S. Shutdown Looms. Bruised Minnesotans Urge Their Parties to Dig In.
item.description: Congressional Democrats say they will approve no money for the Department of Homeland Security without guardrails on immigration agents. Their voters ...

item.title: Can you medal in quiz? Go for the gold!
item.description: Plus: more Olympics, the Super Bowl and some monks.

item.title: A bipartisan effort to save health subsidies failed. Will ICE reform be different?

item.title: On their way! 4 people on NASA Crew-12 mission launch to International Space Station
item.description: The four people are set to dock with the I.S.S. on Saturday, returning the orbital lab to its full complement of seven. NASA's last mission, Crew-11, ...

item.title: RFK Jr. made promises to get his job as health secretary. He's broken many of them

item.title: Why India Playing Pakistan in World Cup Cricket Matters

item.title: Live Updates: Munich Security Conference Begins Amid Trans-Atlantic Turmoil
item.description: Some are hoping for a reprieve of President Trumpâs blunt-force diplomacy. Others fear new disdain and recriminations.
